passes.benefit_text: This coupon is valid for 50% off admission for up to four people for either the guided mansion tour or the grounds pass.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free.
MUSEUM HOURS:
WEEKDAYS 11 AM – 5 PM | WEEKENDS 10 AM – 5 PM | THURSDAYS 11 AM – 9 PM | CLOSED TUESDAYS

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits 1 vehicle for parking free admission.
The pass must be returned at the end of the day of use so that it is available for use the next day.
WEEKEND PASSES
If you intend to use the pass on a Sunday, place your reservation for Saturday, the day before, and return the pass before Monday morning. You can use the pass on both Saturday and Sunday if you wish.
source_phrases: Each pass admits 1 vehicle for parking free admission.
The pass must be returned at the end of the day of use so that it is available for use the next day.
WEEKEND PASSES

If you intend to use the pass on a Sunday, place your reservation for Saturday, the day before, and return the pass before Monday morning. You can use the pass on both Saturday and Sunday if you wish.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text: Each pass may be redeemed for up to two adult tickets at $15 per person, and four youth tickets at $10 per person.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium, for up to 4 guests.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium's ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium's website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
source_phrases: This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium, for up to 4 guests.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.

Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium's website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
1. This is valid for online reservations and walk-up rentals at Spot Pond, in Stoneham.
2. Online reservations can be made here ( Reserve a boat )– Only for the day that the pass is reserved from the
library.
3. This card is valid for one boat rental per day.
a. This includes:
i. Any type of single kayak (fits up to one person)
source_phrases: 1. This is valid for online reservations and walk-up rentals at Spot Pond, in Stoneham.
2. Online reservations can be made here ( Reserve a boat )– Only for the day that the pass is reserved from the
library.
3. This card is valid for one boat rental per day.
a. This includes:
i. Any type of single kayak (fits up to one person)
ii. Double kayaks (fits two adults)
iii. Standard Canoes (fits up to three adults or two adults and two children)
iv. XL Canoes (fits up to five adults)
4. Save time and fill out your waiver ahead of time:  Paddleboston.com/Waiver

passes.title: Paddle Boston
passes.benefit_text: After reserving this Library pass, you will receive a promo code on the confirmation page. The code allows you to purchase up to two tickets at the reduced rate of $12 each.
